name: Grill-Side Garden Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Whole Kernel Corn - Fresh Cooked or Frozen-Thawed
1 Small Avocado - Ripe, Peeled, Seeded, and Coarsely Chopped
1/3 Cup Thinly Sliced Green Onions with Tops
2 Tablespoons Cilantro or Parsley - Fresh, Chopped
1 Tablespoon Lemon Juice or Lime Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, zucchini, corn, avocado, and green onions in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: vegetable oil, cilantro or parsley, lemon juice, garlic salt, and ground cumin.
3. Mix well to create a dressing.
4. Pour the dressing over the vegetable mixture and mix gently.
5. Chill for 3-4 hours, occasionally stirring gently.
6. Stir gently before serving chilled or at room temperature with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
7. Makes about 4 cups salad.
NOTE: One cup of cooked fresh corn kernels or one can (8.75 oz) of whole kernel corn, drained, may be substituted for frozen corn.
